name: Orzo with Turkey and Fennel
recipeIngredient: 1/2 large trimmed fennel bulb, diced into 1/3-inch pieces, about 1 cup
1 1/2 cups diced or chopped leftover turkey
1 cup (6 ounces) cooked orzo noodles, according to package instructions
2 large plum tomatoes, outer shells only, diced into small pieces
2 tablespoons finely sliced fresh basil leaves
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a 12-inch non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. When hot, add onion, garlic, and fennel. Cook until heated through, about 3 minutes, stirring often.
2. Add turkey, parsley, sage, cooked orzo, and 1/2 cup turkey stock or reduced-sodium chicken broth. Mix well. Heat through. Add tomatoes, cheese, basil, salt, and pepper to taste. Toss until combined. Adjust seasoning and add remaining liquid as needed. Serve hot.
